question: BLS pauses monthly job report by June 2026?
evidence: E.J. Antoni suggested suspending monthly jobs reports in August 2025 due to data accuracy concerns.
His nomination was withdrawn in October 2025, removing the proposal from consideration.
No subsequent actions or proposals have been reported regarding suspending monthly jobs reports.
